item.title: Betrayed by Her “Friends” for Wanting Love
item.description: A young woman’s search for affection ended in betrayal. How did those closest to her turn against her in the worst way?

media:content.media:title: Betrayed by Her “Friends” for Wanting Love
media:content.media:description: A young woman’s search for affection ended in betrayal. How did those closest to her turn against her in the worst way?

item.title: Student Who Became UK’s Worst Rapist Ever
item.description: A promising student turned into one of the UK’s most notorious criminals. How did his double life unravel into horror?

item.title: A Mother Hid Her Babies in a Secret Room for Years — The Shocking Truth Part Two

item.title: Joji Obara: The Japanese Millionaire Whose Acts Towards Women Were Pure Evil
item.description: Wealth and status masked a sinister reality. How did Joji Obara’s crimes expose the darkness behind his fortune?

item.title: A Mother Hid Her Babies in a Secret Room for Years — The Shocking Truth Part One

item.title: The Troubled Upbringing of Nikko Jenkins
item.description: Nikko Jenkins’ violent path began long before his crimes. What role did his troubled upbringing play in shaping one of Nebraska’s most notorious cases?
